message.content:
1) Yes, there is a horizontal time ruler with tick marks (0:00, 0:30, 1:00, 1:30, 2:00) and time labels.  
2) No, there are no visible draggable in/out trim handles (vertical bars with grip thumbs) on the timeline.  
3) Yes, there is a waveform (audio amplitude visualization with varying heights); it has varying peaks (not flat/repeating).  
4) No, there is no visible playhead (vertical line marker) on the timeline.  
5) The surfaces/cards are OPAQUE (solid background).  
6) The background is warm-tinted dark.  
7) Yes, there are visible hairline rules (1px horizontal divider lines).  
8) Timecodes (e.g., 2:14) are shown in a sans-serif font.  
9) Playback controls (play/pause buttons) are custom-designed (not stock lucide-style outline icons).  
10) Exact text labels (top to bottom):  
- "Vault v.01"  
- "v.01 • READY"  
- "01"  
- "THE VAULT"  
- "JUN 30"  
- "Keep the frame, drop the noise."  
- "A considered downloader for YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok. Pick the moment, choose the format, archive it."  
- "FIG. 01 – INPUT"
